attribution.changes: Statements formalized (translated) into Lean 4 by parZer; proofs are conditional on the disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: On large subsets of with no three-term arithmetic progression

nodes.label: mdim
nodes.lean:
noncomputable def mdim (q n : ℕ) (d : ℝ) : ℕ :=
  (Finset.univ.filter (fun e : Fin n → Fin q => (∑ i, (e i : ℕ)) ≤ ⌊d⌋₊)).card

nodes.citation: Theorem (th:main) proof: the space V of polynomials vanishing on the complement of -gamma*A has dim >= m_d - q^n + |A|; maximal-support P gives dim V <= 2 m_{d/2} via Proposition pr:clp; whence |A| <= 2 m_{d/2} + (q^n - m_d).
nodes.label: lem_clp_dim_bound
nodes.lean: theorem lem_clp_dim_bound : ∀ {K : Type*} [Field K] [Fintype K] (q n : ℕ), Fintype.card K = q → ∀ (α β γ : K), α + β + γ = 0 → γ ≠ 0 → ∀ (A : Finset (Fin n → K)), (∀ a ∈ A, ∀ b ∈ A, ∀ c ∈ A, α • a + β • b + γ • c = 0 → a = b ∧ b = c) → ∀ (d : ℝ), A.card ≤ 2 * mdim q n (d / 2) + (q ^ n - mdim q n d) := by sorry

nodes.citation: Theorem (th:main) proof: q^n - m_d is the number of q-power-free monomials of degree > d, in bijection with monomials of degree < (q-1)n - d, of which there are at most m_{(q-1)n-d}.
nodes.label: lem_monomial_reflect
nodes.lean: theorem lem_monomial_reflect : ∀ (q n : ℕ) (d : ℝ), q ^ n - mdim q n d ≤ mdim q n (((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) - d) := by sorry

nodes.citation: + Corollary proof: by Cramer's theorem [timo, A course on large deviations, Sec 2.4], lim (1/n) log(m_{(q-1)n/3}/q^n) = -I((q-1)/3); for q=3, x=2/3 the sup is at e^theta=(sqrt 33 - 1)/8, giving 3 e^{-I(2/3)} < 2.756.
nodes.label: lem_capset_const
nodes.lean: theorem lem_capset_const : ∀ (ε : ℝ), 0 < ε → ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ (n : ℕ), N ≤ n → (3 * mdim 3 n (((3 : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) / 3) : ℝ) ≤ ε * 2.756 ^ n := by sorry

nodes.citation: Corollary proof: 'applying Theorem th:main with alpha=beta=gamma=1'. In char 3, a+c=b+b (3AP-free) <=> a+b+c=0, and the trivial-solution conclusion a=b=c coincides.
nodes.label: lem_capset_ap_bridge
nodes.lean: theorem lem_capset_ap_bridge : ∀ (n : ℕ) (A : Finset (Fin n → ZMod 3)), ThreeAPFree (↑A : Set (Fin n → ZMod 3)) → ∀ a ∈ A, ∀ b ∈ A, ∀ c ∈ A, (1 : ZMod 3) • a + (1 : ZMod 3) • b + (1 : ZMod 3) • c = 0 → a = b ∧ b = c := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_clp
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_clp : ∀ {K : Type*} [Field K] [Fintype K] [DecidableEq K] (q n : ℕ), Fintype.card K = q → ∀ (A : Finset (Fin n → K)) (α β γ : K), α + β + γ = 0 → ∀ (d : ℝ) (P : MvPolynomial (Fin n) K), (P.totalDegree : ℝ) ≤ d → (∀ i, MvPolynomial.degreeOf i P ≤ q - 1) → (∀ a ∈ A, ∀ b ∈ A, a ≠ b → MvPolynomial.eval (α • a + β • b) P = 0) → (A.filter (fun a => MvPolynomial.eval ((-γ) • a) P ≠ 0)).card ≤ 2 * mdim q n (d / 2) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_main
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_thm_main : ∀ {K : Type*} [Field K] [Fintype K] (q n : ℕ), Fintype.card K = q → ∀ (α β γ : K), α + β + γ = 0 → γ ≠ 0 → ∀ (A : Finset (Fin n → K)), (∀ a ∈ A, ∀ b ∈ A, ∀ c ∈ A, α • a + β • b + γ • c = 0 → a = b ∧ b = c) → A.card ≤ 3 * mdim q n (((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) / 3) := by
  intro K _ _ q n hq α β γ hsum hγ A hA; have hbound := lem_clp_dim_bound q n hq α β γ hsum hγ A hA (2 * ((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) / 3); have hrefl := lem_monomial_reflect q n (2 * ((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) / 3); rw [show (2 * ((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) / 3) / 2 = ((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) / 3 by ring] at hbound; rw [show ((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) - 2 * ((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) / 3 = ((q : ℝ) - 1) * (n : ℝ) / 3 by ring] at hrefl; omega

nodes.label: thm_cor_capset
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_capset : ∀ (ε : ℝ), 0 < ε → ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ (n : ℕ), N ≤ n → ∀ (A : Finset (Fin n → ZMod 3)), ThreeAPFree (↑A : Set (Fin n → ZMod 3)) → (A.card : ℝ) ≤ ε * 2.756 ^ n := by sorry

title: On large subsets of with no three-term arithmetic progression
